name: add-session-table-happy-path
task: Add a new session table for options chain data called session_options_chain. It should store ticker, expiration_date, strike_price, option_type (call/put), bid, ask, volume, open_interest, and implied_volatility. Wire it to the get_options_chain tool.
assertions: A CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS session_options_chain statement is added to the schema creation in data-cache.ts
The table includes _tool_call_id VARCHAR and _fetched_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp columns
A cacheOptionsChain() function is added in data-cache.ts that uses safeNum/safeStr for type-safe column insertion
An entry mapping 'get_options_chain' to the cache function is added in TOOL_CACHE_MAP
A case for 'get_options_chain' is added in the switch inside cacheToolResult()
